---
title: <span data-i18n-key="title"></span>
subtitle: <span data-i18n-key="subtitle"></span>
format:
  thinkridentity-revealjs:
    footer: |
      {{< i18n-select choices="fr:Français, en:English" selected="fr" >}}
    theme: custom.scss
    slideNumber: false
    i18n:
      defaultLocale: "fr"
      fr:
        title: "Pierrot s'est fait pirater"
        subtitle: "Sécuriser ses applications Shiny"
        section_hello: "Bonjour"
        section_command_injection: "Command Injection"
        section_sql_injection: "SQL Injection"
        section_xss: "XSS"
        section_secured_kitchen: "La cuisine sécurisée de Pierrot"
        years_ago_3_title: "Il y a 3 ans..."
        years_ago_3_text: 'Aux <a href="https://arthurdata.github.io/rencontresR2023/#/title-slide" target="_blank">🔗 Rencontres R 2023</a>, Pierrot <strong>maquettait</strong> son application Shiny.'
        kitchen_being_drawn: "<em>La cuisine se dessine.</em>"
        years_ago_1_title: "Il y a 1 an..."
        years_ago_1_text: 'Aux <a href="https://arthurdata.github.io/rencontresR2025" target="_blank">🔗 Rencontres R 2025</a>, Pierrot <strong>testait</strong> son application Shiny.'
        kitchen_solid: "<em>La cuisine est solide : tiroirs testés, modules emboîtés, repas cuisiné.</em>"
        pierrot_2026_title: "Pierrot 2026"
        pierrot_proud: "Pierrot est fier"
        app_mockuped: "Son application est <strong>maquettée</strong>."
        app_tested: "Elle est <strong>testée</strong>."
        app_in_production: "Elle est <strong>en production</strong> chez son client."
        all_good: "<em>Tout va bien.</em>"
        until_this_morning: "... jusqu'à ce matin"
        the_phone_call: "Le coup de fil"
        phone_call_quote: "📞 <em>« Pierrot, on a un gros problème avec l'app... »</em>"
        you_have_been_hacked: "> Vous avez été piratés."
        kitchen_burgled_title: "La cuisine cambriolée"
        pierrots_beautiful_kitchen: "La belle cuisine de Pierrot..."
        door_forced: "La porte forcée"
        drawers_emptied: "Les tiroirs vidés"
        safe_opened: "Le coffre-fort ouvert"
        pierrots_fears_title: "Les craintes de Pierrot..."
        what_he_planned: "Ce qu'il avait prévu"
        badly_built: "✅ Mal montée"
        not_robust: "✅ Pas robuste"
        badly_tested: "✅ Mal testée"
        what_he_forgot: "Ce qu'il avait oublié"
        burgled: "❓ Cambriolée"
        pierrot_didnt_think: "Pierrot n'avait pas pensé à..."
        to_security: "... la sécurité 🔐"
        security_part_of_job: "La sécurité fait partie du métier"
        same_as: "Au même titre que :"
        the_tests: "✅ Les <strong>tests</strong>"
        the_documentation: "✅ La <strong>documentation</strong>"
        not_only_experts: "<em>Pas réservée aux experts en cybersécurité. C'est notre métier de dev.</em>"
        good_news_shiny: "Bonne nouvelle : Shiny est bien foutu"
        inputs_strings: "Inputs ≈ <strong>strings</strong>."
        we_type: "On tape :"
        no_eval_safe: "✅ Pas d'évaluation = <em>safe</em>."
        bad_news_title: "Mauvaise nouvelle"
        only_diff_html: "Une seule diff : <code>HTML(input$message)</code> au lieu de <code>input$message</code>."
        script_executes: "💥 le script s'exécute."
        xss_flaw: "🐛 Faille <strong>XSS</strong>"
        code_injection_title: "L'injection de code"
        code_injection_principle: "<strong>Le principe</strong> : injecter du code malveillant qui sera ensuite exécuté par l'application."
        three_big_families: "3 grandes familles"
        family_xss: "🐛 <strong>XSS (Cross-Site Scripting)</strong> : côté navigateur (client)"
        family_command: "🐛 <strong>Command Injection</strong> : côté serveur"
        family_sql: "🐛 <strong>SQL Injection</strong> : côté base de données"
        common_point: "<em>Le point commun : exploiter l'absence de validation des données utilisateur.</em>"
        cmd_inj_subtitle: "Du code R exécuté côté serveur"
        user_input_ui: "Une <strong>saisie utilisateur</strong> depuis l'interface..."
        evaluated_by_app: "...<strong>Évaluée</strong> par l'application..."
        anyone_can_run_r: "➜ N'importe qui peut exécuter du code R sur <strong>votre</strong> serveur."
        file_read_etc: "<em>Lecture de fichiers, accès au système, exfiltration de secrets</em>"
        cmd_inj_reprex_safe: "Command Injection — Reprex safe"
        input_stays_string: "L'input reste une <strong>string</strong>, jamais évaluée comme du code."
        feature_evolves: "La feature évolue..."
        input_as_code: "L'input est traité comme <strong>du code à interpréter</strong>, plus comme du contenu."
        we_add_braces: "On rajoute les accolades :"
        input_evaluated_code: "💥 L'input est <strong>évalué comme du code</strong>."
        offensive_demo: "Démo offensive"
        oops: "...oups 🙊"
        why_sneaky: "Pourquoi c'est sournois"
        glue_equiv: "<code>glue(input$template)</code> ≈ <code>eval(parse(text = input$template))</code>"
        glue_more_discrete: "Mais <code>glue()</code> est <strong>plus discret</strong> car il évalue automatiquement ce qu'il y a entre <code>{}</code>."
        best_practice_1: "🥇 Bonne pratique #1"
        freeze_template: "Figer le template :"
        select_input_excuse: '"Mais j''ai un <code>selectInput</code> !"'
        select_input_3_choices_ui: "<code>selectInput</code> → 3 choix uniquement... côté UI."
        browser_console: "Console navigateur :"
        select_input_bypassed: "💥 <code>selectInput</code> contourné."
        best_practice_2: "🥇 Bonne pratique #2"
        validate_server_side: "Valider côté <strong>serveur</strong>"
        or_switch_if: "Ou via <code>switch()</code> / <code>if</code> selon le besoin."
        any_data_validated: "<em>Toute donnée venant du client doit être validée serveur-side. Toujours.</em>"
        insecure_deserialization: "Insecure Deserialization"
        attacker_rds: "Un <code>.rds</code> généré par l'attaquant :"
        code_runs_on_use: "Du code <strong>s'exécute à l'utilisation</strong> de l'objet, pas à <code>readRDS()</code>."
        attacker_code_executed: "💥 Code attaquant exécuté côté serveur."
        best_practice_3: "🥇 Bonne pratique #3"
        prefer_simple_formats: "Privilégier des formats <em>simples</em>"
        csv_txt_json: "✅ <code>.csv</code>, <code>.txt</code>, <code>.json</code> — du <strong>contenu</strong>, pas du code sérialisé."
        if_really_rds_sandbox_1: "🛡️ Si vraiment besoin d'un <code>.rds</code> : <strong>sandbox</strong>."
        if_really_rds_sandbox_2: "(<code>callr</code>, <code>processx</code> en environnement restreint, container...)"
        rule_one: "Règle n°1"
        never_trust_user_input: "<em>Ne fais jamais confiance à l'entrée utilisateur, quel que soit le contexte.</em>"
        sql_inj_title: "SQL Injection"
        type_1_robert: "Tape <code>1</code> ➜ Robert ✅"
        type_or_1_1: "Tape <code>1 OR 1=1</code> ➜ <strong>toute la table</strong> 💥"
        offensive_demos: "Démos offensives"
        leak_all_rows: "<strong>Fuite</strong> : on récupère <strong>toutes</strong> les lignes de la table."
        destruction_table: "<strong>Destruction</strong> : selon le driver, la table disparaît."
        select_input_excuse_bis: '"Mais j''ai un <code>selectInput</code> !" (bis)'
        select_input_5_ids: "<code>selectInput</code> → 5 IDs uniquement... côté UI."
        same_leak_despite: "💥 Même fuite, malgré le <code>selectInput</code>."
        best_practice_4: "🥇 Bonne pratique #4"
        before_label: "❌ Avant"
        with_sql_interpolate: "✅ Avec <code>sqlInterpolate</code>"
        same_attack_empty: "<em>Même attaque <code>1 OR 1=1</code> ➜ requête vide, table intacte.</em>"
        or_with_glue_sql: "✅ Ou avec <code>glue_sql</code>"
        xss_full: "XSS : Cross-Site Scripting"
        js_executed_browser: "Du code JS exécuté <strong>côté navigateur</strong>"
        attacker_injects: "L'attaquant injecte du code dans une page..."
        stored_or_reflected: "...stocké côté serveur ou simplement reflété..."
        executed_all_visitors: "➜ exécuté chez <strong>tous les visiteurs</strong> qui consultent la page."
        wall_of_comments: "XSS : Un mur de commentaires"
        pierrot_posts: "Pierrot poste un message :"
        everything_works: "Tout fonctionne ✅"
        attacker_arrives_title: "XSS : Un attaquant arrive"
        another_posts: "Un autre poste :"
        alert_all_visitors: "💥 Alert chez tous les visiteurs."
        each_reload: "Et <strong>à chaque rechargement</strong> : ça repart."
        real_theft: "XSS : Le vrai vol"
        attacker_refines: "L'attaquant raffine :"
        fake_login_button: "💥 Faux bouton de <strong>connexion</strong> pour tous."
        silent_credentials_theft: "➜ Vol silencieux des credentials."
        best_practice_5: "🥇 Bonne pratique #5"
        escape_user_content: "Échapper le contenu utilisateur avec <code>htmltools::htmlEscape()</code>"
        after_label: "✅ Après"
        script_becomes_text: "<em>Le <code>&lt;script&gt;</code> devient du texte affiché, pas exécuté.</em>"
        apply_all_user_content: "À appliquer sur <strong>tout</strong> contenu utilisateur : pseudo <em>et</em> message."
        three_doors_close: "Les 3 portes à fermer"
        cmd_inj_summary: "🐛 <strong>Command Injection</strong> : jamais évaluer un input"
        sql_inj_summary: "🐛 <strong>SQL Injection</strong> : <code>sqlInterpolate()</code> ou <code>glue_sql()</code>, toujours"
        xss_summary: "🐛 <strong>XSS</strong> : <code>htmlEscape()</code> tout ce qui s'affiche"
        rule_one_recap: "🔐 <strong>Et la règle n°1</strong> : ne jamais faire confiance à l'utilisateur"
        not_had_time: "Et tout ce qu'on n'a pas eu le temps de voir"
        authentication: "🔑 <strong>L'authentification</strong> : <code>shinymanager</code>, Posit Connect, OAuth..."
        auth_other_subject: "<em>C'est un autre sujet, mais essentiel.</em>"
        dependencies_up_to_date: "📦 <strong>Les dépendances à jour</strong> : pas de Dependabot natif en R."
        regular_update: "Mise à jour régulière, surveillance manuelle des annonces upstream des paquets critiques."
        going_further: "Pour aller plus loin"
        training: "S'entraîner"
        readings: "Lectures"
        thank_you: "Merci"
        any_questions: "Des questions ?"
        pierrot_thanks_you: "<em>Pierrot vous remercie.</em>"
      en:
        title: "Pierrot got hacked"
        subtitle: "Securing your Shiny apps"
        section_hello: "Hello"
        section_command_injection: "Command Injection"
        section_sql_injection: "SQL Injection"
        section_xss: "XSS"
        section_secured_kitchen: "Pierrot's secured kitchen"
        years_ago_3_title: "3 years ago..."
        years_ago_3_text: 'At <a href="https://arthurdata.github.io/rencontresR2023/#/title-slide" target="_blank">🔗 Rencontres R 2023</a>, Pierrot was <strong>sketching</strong> his Shiny app.'
        kitchen_being_drawn: "<em>The kitchen is taking shape.</em>"
        years_ago_1_title: "1 year ago..."
        years_ago_1_text: 'At <a href="https://arthurdata.github.io/rencontresR2025" target="_blank">🔗 Rencontres R 2025</a>, Pierrot was <strong>testing</strong> his Shiny app.'
        kitchen_solid: "<em>The kitchen is solid: drawers tested, modules slotted in, meal cooked.</em>"
        pierrot_2026_title: "Pierrot 2026"
        pierrot_proud: "Pierrot is proud"
        app_mockuped: "His app is <strong>sketched</strong>."
        app_tested: "It is <strong>tested</strong>."
        app_in_production: "It is <strong>in production</strong> at his client's."
        all_good: "<em>All good.</em>"
        until_this_morning: "... until this morning"
        the_phone_call: "The phone call"
        phone_call_quote: "📞 <em>« Pierrot, we have a big problem with the app... »</em>"
        you_have_been_hacked: "> You have been hacked."
        kitchen_burgled_title: "The burgled kitchen"
        pierrots_beautiful_kitchen: "Pierrot's beautiful kitchen..."
        door_forced: "The door forced open"
        drawers_emptied: "The drawers emptied"
        safe_opened: "The safe opened"
        pierrots_fears_title: "Pierrot's fears..."
        what_he_planned: "What he had planned for"
        badly_built: "✅ Badly built"
        not_robust: "✅ Not robust"
        badly_tested: "✅ Badly tested"
        what_he_forgot: "What he had forgotten"
        burgled: "❓ Burgled"
        pierrot_didnt_think: "Pierrot hadn't thought of..."
        to_security: "... security 🔐"
        security_part_of_job: "Security is part of the job"
        same_as: "Just like:"
        the_tests: "✅ <strong>Tests</strong>"
        the_documentation: "✅ <strong>Documentation</strong>"
        not_only_experts: "<em>Not reserved for cybersecurity experts. It's our job as developers.</em>"
        good_news_shiny: "Good news: Shiny is well designed"
        inputs_strings: "Inputs ≈ <strong>strings</strong>."
        we_type: "We type:"
        no_eval_safe: "✅ No evaluation = <em>safe</em>."
        bad_news_title: "Bad news"
        only_diff_html: "One single diff: <code>HTML(input$message)</code> instead of <code>input$message</code>."
        script_executes: "💥 the script executes."
        xss_flaw: "🐛 <strong>XSS</strong> vulnerability"
        code_injection_title: "Code injection"
        code_injection_principle: "<strong>The principle</strong>: inject malicious code that will then be executed by the application."
        three_big_families: "3 main families"
        family_xss: "🐛 <strong>XSS (Cross-Site Scripting)</strong>: browser-side (client)"
        family_command: "🐛 <strong>Command Injection</strong>: server-side"
        family_sql: "🐛 <strong>SQL Injection</strong>: database-side"
        common_point: "<em>Common thread: exploiting the lack of user input validation.</em>"
        cmd_inj_subtitle: "R code executed on the server"
        user_input_ui: "A <strong>user input</strong> from the interface..."
        evaluated_by_app: "...<strong>evaluated</strong> by the application..."
        anyone_can_run_r: "➜ Anyone can run R code on <strong>your</strong> server."
        file_read_etc: "<em>File reads, system access, secrets exfiltration</em>"
        cmd_inj_reprex_safe: "Command Injection — Safe reprex"
        input_stays_string: "The input stays a <strong>string</strong>, never evaluated as code."
        feature_evolves: "The feature evolves..."
        input_as_code: "The input is treated as <strong>code to interpret</strong>, no longer as content."
        we_add_braces: "We add the braces:"
        input_evaluated_code: "💥 The input is <strong>evaluated as code</strong>."
        offensive_demo: "Offensive demo"
        oops: "...oops 🙊"
        why_sneaky: "Why it's sneaky"
        glue_equiv: "<code>glue(input$template)</code> ≈ <code>eval(parse(text = input$template))</code>"
        glue_more_discrete: "But <code>glue()</code> is <strong>more discreet</strong> because it automatically evaluates what's between <code>{}</code>."
        best_practice_1: "🥇 Best practice #1"
        freeze_template: "Freeze the template:"
        select_input_excuse: '"But I have a <code>selectInput</code>!"'
        select_input_3_choices_ui: "<code>selectInput</code> → only 3 choices... on the UI side."
        browser_console: "Browser console:"
        select_input_bypassed: "💥 <code>selectInput</code> bypassed."
        best_practice_2: "🥇 Best practice #2"
        validate_server_side: "Validate on the <strong>server</strong> side"
        or_switch_if: "Or via <code>switch()</code> / <code>if</code> depending on the need."
        any_data_validated: "<em>Any data coming from the client must be validated server-side. Always.</em>"
        insecure_deserialization: "Insecure Deserialization"
        attacker_rds: "An <code>.rds</code> generated by the attacker:"
        code_runs_on_use: "Code <strong>runs when the object is used</strong>, not on <code>readRDS()</code>."
        attacker_code_executed: "💥 Attacker code executed on the server."
        best_practice_3: "🥇 Best practice #3"
        prefer_simple_formats: "Prefer <em>simple</em> formats"
        csv_txt_json: "✅ <code>.csv</code>, <code>.txt</code>, <code>.json</code> — <strong>content</strong>, not serialized code."
        if_really_rds_sandbox_1: "🛡️ If you really need an <code>.rds</code>: <strong>sandbox</strong> it."
        if_really_rds_sandbox_2: "(<code>callr</code>, <code>processx</code> in a restricted environment, container...)"
        rule_one: "Rule #1"
        never_trust_user_input: "<em>Never trust user input, whatever the context.</em>"
        sql_inj_title: "SQL Injection"
        type_1_robert: "Type <code>1</code> ➜ Robert ✅"
        type_or_1_1: "Type <code>1 OR 1=1</code> ➜ <strong>the whole table</strong> 💥"
        offensive_demos: "Offensive demos"
        leak_all_rows: "<strong>Leak</strong>: we recover <strong>all</strong> the rows of the table."
        destruction_table: "<strong>Destruction</strong>: depending on the driver, the table disappears."
        select_input_excuse_bis: '"But I have a <code>selectInput</code>!" (bis)'
        select_input_5_ids: "<code>selectInput</code> → only 5 IDs... on the UI side."
        same_leak_despite: "💥 Same leak, despite the <code>selectInput</code>."
        best_practice_4: "🥇 Best practice #4"
        before_label: "❌ Before"
        with_sql_interpolate: "✅ With <code>sqlInterpolate</code>"
        same_attack_empty: "<em>Same attack <code>1 OR 1=1</code> ➜ empty query, table intact.</em>"
        or_with_glue_sql: "✅ Or with <code>glue_sql</code>"
        xss_full: "XSS: Cross-Site Scripting"
        js_executed_browser: "JS code executed <strong>in the browser</strong>"
        attacker_injects: "The attacker injects code into a page..."
        stored_or_reflected: "...stored server-side or simply reflected..."
        executed_all_visitors: "➜ executed on <strong>every visitor</strong> who views the page."
        wall_of_comments: "XSS: A wall of comments"
        pierrot_posts: "Pierrot posts a message:"
        everything_works: "Everything works ✅"
        attacker_arrives_title: "XSS: An attacker arrives"
        another_posts: "Someone else posts:"
        alert_all_visitors: "💥 Alert on every visitor."
        each_reload: "And <strong>on every reload</strong>: it starts again."
        real_theft: "XSS: The real theft"
        attacker_refines: "The attacker refines:"
        fake_login_button: "💥 Fake <strong>login</strong> button for everyone."
        silent_credentials_theft: "➜ Silent theft of credentials."
        best_practice_5: "🥇 Best practice #5"
        escape_user_content: "Escape user content with <code>htmltools::htmlEscape()</code>"
        after_label: "✅ After"
        script_becomes_text: "<em>The <code>&lt;script&gt;</code> becomes displayed text, not executed.</em>"
        apply_all_user_content: "Apply to <strong>all</strong> user content: username <em>and</em> message."
        three_doors_close: "The 3 doors to close"
        cmd_inj_summary: "🐛 <strong>Command Injection</strong>: never evaluate an input"
        sql_inj_summary: "🐛 <strong>SQL Injection</strong>: <code>sqlInterpolate()</code> or <code>glue_sql()</code>, always"
        xss_summary: "🐛 <strong>XSS</strong>: <code>htmlEscape()</code> everything that's displayed"
        rule_one_recap: "🔐 <strong>And rule #1</strong>: never trust the user"
        not_had_time: "And everything we didn't have time to cover"
        authentication: "🔑 <strong>Authentication</strong>: <code>shinymanager</code>, Posit Connect, OAuth..."
        auth_other_subject: "<em>Another subject, but essential.</em>"
        dependencies_up_to_date: "📦 <strong>Dependencies up to date</strong>: no native Dependabot in R."
        regular_update: "Regular updates, manual monitoring of upstream announcements for critical packages."
        going_further: "Going further"
        training: "Train yourself"
        readings: "Readings"
        thank_you: "Thank you"
        any_questions: "Any questions?"
        pierrot_thanks_you: "<em>Pierrot thanks you.</em>"
chalkboard: false
author: <a href="https://arthurdata.github.io/rencontresR2026" target="_blank">🔗 arthurdata.github.io/rencontresR2026</a>
include-before-body: assets/ground.html
include-after-body: assets/reset-videos.html
date: 2026-06-16
revealjs-plugins:
  - i18n
resources:
  - assets/videos/*.webm
  - assets/ground.html
  - assets/reset-videos.html
---

# <span data-i18n-key="section_hello"></span>

## <span data-i18n-key="years_ago_3_title"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-right data-id="pierrot"}
{{< quarto-lottie src=https://lottie.host/5f2ed099-4737-471d-a199-96b7786d7c88/JhebxcrsLV.json >}}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="years_ago_3_text"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="kitchen_being_drawn"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="years_ago_1_title"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
::: {data-id="pierrot"}
{{< quarto-lottie src=https://lottie.host/5f2ed099-4737-471d-a199-96b7786d7c88/JhebxcrsLV.json >}}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="years_ago_1_text"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="kitchen_solid"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="pierrot_2026_title"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
::: {data-id="pierrot"}
{{< quarto-lottie src=https://lottie.host/5f2ed099-4737-471d-a199-96b7786d7c88/JhebxcrsLV.json >}}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
### <span data-i18n-key="pierrot_proud"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="app_mockuped"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="app_tested"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="app_in_production"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="all_good"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="until_this_morning"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
::: {data-id="pierrot"}
{{< quarto-lottie src=https://lottie.host/5f2ed099-4737-471d-a199-96b7786d7c88/JhebxcrsLV.json >}}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
### <span data-i18n-key="the_phone_call"></span>

> <span data-i18n-key="phone_call_quote"></span>
:::

:::
::::

# {background-color="black"}

<div class="hacked-screen-off"></div>

::: {.hacked-typewriter-wrap}
::: {.hacked-typewriter}
<span data-i18n-key="you_have_been_hacked"></span>
:::
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="kitchen_burgled_title"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
{{< quarto-lottie src=https://lottie.host/5f2ed099-4737-471d-a199-96b7786d7c88/JhebxcrsLV.json >}}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
### <span data-i18n-key="pierrots_beautiful_kitchen"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="door_forced"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="drawers_emptied"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="safe_opened"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="pierrots_fears_title"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
### <span data-i18n-key="what_he_planned"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="badly_built"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="not_robust"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="badly_tested"></span>
:::
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### <span data-i18n-key="what_he_forgot"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="burgled"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="pierrot_didnt_think"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
### <span data-i18n-key="to_security"></span>
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="security_part_of_job"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="same_as"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="the_tests"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="the_documentation"></span>
:::

\

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
<span data-i18n-key="not_only_experts"></span>
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="good_news_shiny"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex1")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex1.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

<span data-i18n-key="inputs_strings"></span>


::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="we_type"></span>

`<script>alert()</script>`{style="font-size: 0.88rem"}
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="no_eval_safe"></span>

:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="bad_news_title"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex2")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex2.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="only_diff_html"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="we_type"></span>

`<script>alert()</script>`{style="font-size: 0.88rem"}

<span data-i18n-key="script_executes"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="xss_flaw"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="code_injection_title"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="code_injection_principle"></span>

\

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
### <span data-i18n-key="three_big_families"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="family_xss"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="family_command"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="family_sql"></span>
:::

\

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
<span data-i18n-key="common_point"></span>
:::

# <span data-i18n-key="section_command_injection"></span>

## <span data-i18n-key="section_command_injection"></span>

### <span data-i18n-key="cmd_inj_subtitle"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="user_input_ui"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="evaluated_by_app"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="anyone_can_run_r"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="file_read_etc"></span>
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="cmd_inj_reprex_safe"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex3")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex3.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
`glue("Ton choix est : {input$xyz}")`{style="font-size: 0.88rem"}

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="we_type"></span>

`Hello {1+1}`{style="font-size: 0.88rem"}

<span data-i18n-key="input_stays_string"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="no_eval_safe"></span>
:::
:::
::::


## <span data-i18n-key="feature_evolves"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex4")`
:::
<video data-id="reprex4-video" src="assets/videos/reprex4.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

`glue(input$xyz)`{style="font-size: 0.88rem"}

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="input_as_code"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="we_add_braces"></span>

`Hello {1+1}`{style="font-size: 0.88rem"}

→ `Hello 2`.
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="input_evaluated_code"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="offensive_demo"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex4")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/offensive.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
```r
{system("ls /")}
{readLines("/etc/passwd")}
{system("whoami")}
{system("rm -rf /")}
{system("useradd hacker")}
```

<span data-i18n-key="oops"></span>
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="why_sneaky"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="glue_equiv"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
\

<span data-i18n-key="glue_more_discrete"></span>
:::

\

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
### <span data-i18n-key="best_practice_1"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="freeze_template"></span>

```r
glue("{input$template}")
```
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="select_input_excuse"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex5")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex5.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="select_input_3_choices_ui"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="browser_console"></span>

`Shiny.setInputValue("color", "{1+1}")`{style="font-size: 0.8rem"}

<span data-i18n-key="select_input_bypassed"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="best_practice_2"></span>

### <span data-i18n-key="validate_server_side"></span>

```r
input_color <- match.arg(
  input$color,
  choices = c("red", "green", "blue")
)
```

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="or_switch_if"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
\

[<span data-i18n-key="any_data_validated"></span>]{.relevant}
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="insecure_deserialization"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex6")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex6.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="attacker_rds"></span>

```r
evil <- function() {
  system("touch /tmp/hacked")
}
saveRDS(evil, "evil.rds")
```
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="code_runs_on_use"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="attacker_code_executed"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="best_practice_3"></span>

### <span data-i18n-key="prefer_simple_formats"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="csv_txt_json"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="if_really_rds_sandbox_1"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="if_really_rds_sandbox_2"></span>
:::

## {.center background-color="#4169ed"}

### <span data-i18n-key="rule_one"></span>

### [<span data-i18n-key="never_trust_user_input"></span>]{.relevant}

# <span data-i18n-key="section_sql_injection"></span>

## <span data-i18n-key="sql_inj_title"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex7")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex7.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
`paste0("SELECT … WHERE id = ", input$x)`{style="font-size: 0.78rem"}
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="type_1_robert"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="type_or_1_1"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="offensive_demos"></span>

```sql
1 OR 1=1
```

<span data-i18n-key="leak_all_rows"></span>


\

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
```sql
1; DROP TABLE users
```

<span data-i18n-key="destruction_table"></span>
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="select_input_excuse_bis"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex8")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex8.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="select_input_5_ids"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="browser_console"></span>

`Shiny.setInputValue("user_input", "1 OR 1=1")`{style="font-size: 0.88rem"}

<span data-i18n-key="same_leak_despite"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="best_practice_4"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**<span data-i18n-key="before_label"></span>**

```r
rv$query <- paste0(
  "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ",
  input$user_input
)
rv$result <- dbGetQuery(
  con, rv$query
)
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**<span data-i18n-key="with_sql_interpolate"></span>**

```r
rv$query <- sqlInterpolate(
  con,
  "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?id",
  id = input$user_input
)
rv$result <- dbGetQuery(
  con, rv$query
)
```
:::
::::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="same_attack_empty"></span>
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="best_practice_4"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**<span data-i18n-key="before_label"></span>**

```r
rv$query <- paste0(
  "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ",
  input$user_input
)
rv$result <- dbGetQuery(
  con, rv$query
)
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**<span data-i18n-key="or_with_glue_sql"></span>**

```r
rv$query <- glue_sql(
  "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {input$user_input}",
  .con = con
)
rv$result <- dbGetQuery(
  con, rv$query
)
```
:::
::::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<a href="https://shiny.posit.co/r/articles/build/sql-injections/" target="_blank">📖 shiny.posit.co/r/articles/build/sql-injections/</a>
:::

# <span data-i18n-key="section_xss"></span>

## <span data-i18n-key="xss_full"></span>

### <span data-i18n-key="js_executed_browser"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="attacker_injects"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="stored_or_reflected"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="executed_all_visitors"></span>
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="wall_of_comments"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex11")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex11-act1.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="pierrot_posts"></span>

`Salut tout le monde !`{style="font-size: 0.85rem"}
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="everything_works"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="attacker_arrives_title"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex11")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex11-act2.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="another_posts"></span>

`<script>alert(...)</script>`{style="font-size: 0.75rem"}
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="alert_all_visitors"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="each_reload"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="real_theft"></span> {auto-animate=true}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {.toto}
🔗 `shiny::runApp("security/apps/reprex11")`
:::
<video src="assets/videos/reprex11-act3.webm" autoplay loop muted playsinline style="width:100%"></video>
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="attacker_refines"></span>

```html
<script>
  ...createElement("button")...
  fakeBtn.onclick = ...
  document.body.prepend(fakeBtn);
</script>
```
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="fake_login_button"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="silent_credentials_theft"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="best_practice_5"></span>

### <span data-i18n-key="escape_user_content"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**<span data-i18n-key="before_label"></span>**

```r
glue::glue(
  "<p><strong>{row$pseudo}</strong>",
  " : {row$message}</p>"
)
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**<span data-i18n-key="after_label"></span>**

```r
glue::glue(
  "<p><strong>{htmlEscape(row$pseudo)}</strong>",
  " : {htmlEscape(row$message)}</p>"
)
```
:::
::::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="script_becomes_text"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="apply_all_user_content"></span>
:::

# <span data-i18n-key="section_secured_kitchen"></span>

## <span data-i18n-key="section_secured_kitchen"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
{{< quarto-lottie src=https://lottie.host/5f2ed099-4737-471d-a199-96b7786d7c88/JhebxcrsLV.json >}}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
### <span data-i18n-key="three_doors_close"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="cmd_inj_summary"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="sql_inj_summary"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="xss_summary"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
\

<span data-i18n-key="rule_one_recap"></span>
:::
:::
::::

## <span data-i18n-key="not_had_time"></span>

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
<span data-i18n-key="authentication"></span>
<span data-i18n-key="auth_other_subject"></span>
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
\

<span data-i18n-key="dependencies_up_to_date"></span>

<span data-i18n-key="regular_update"></span>
:::

## <span data-i18n-key="going_further"></span>

### <span data-i18n-key="training"></span>

<a href="https://connect.thinkr.fr/hackthisshiny/" target="_blank">🔗 connect.thinkr.fr/hackthisshiny/</a>

### <span data-i18n-key="readings"></span>

<a href="https://shiny.posit.co/r/articles/build/sql-injections/" target="_blank">🔗 shiny.posit.co/r/articles/build/sql-injections/</a>

<a href="https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/Cross_Site_Scripting_Prevention_Cheat_Sheet.html" target="_blank">🔗 OWASP — XSS Prevention Cheat Sheet</a>

<a href="https://fr.vuejs.org/guide/best-practices/security" target="_blank">🔗 vuejs.org/guide/best-practices/security</a>

## <span data-i18n-key="thank_you"></span>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
{{< quarto-lottie src=https://lottie.host/5f2ed099-4737-471d-a199-96b7786d7c88/JhebxcrsLV.json >}}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
### <span data-i18n-key="any_questions"></span>

<a href="https://arthurdata.github.io/rencontresR2026" target="_blank">🔗 arthurdata.github.io/rencontresR2026</a>

\

<span data-i18n-key="pierrot_thanks_you"></span>
:::
::::
